goal: Integrate Sherlog memory roadmap branches for review

summary.title: Integrate Sherlog memory roadmap branches
summary.what: Merged the verified Sherlog memory roadmap implementation branches into the shared integration branch for unified review, without merging anything into main.
summary.why: The user requested a single integration branch that contains the completed roadmap work so reviewers can inspect the combined result while preserving the existing PRs and main branch state.
summary.user_goal: Integrate Sherlog memory roadmap branches for review

decisions.chose: Use agent/sherlog-memory-review-stack as the unified review branch.
decisions.rationale: This was the previously agreed integration branch and already contained the #70 eval gate foundation.

decisions.chose: Fast-forward the stacked #71/#73 eval line first, then merge independent PR branches with normal merge commits.
decisions.rationale: This preserves the dependency order for #75 -> #79 -> #80 while keeping independent roadmap slices visible in the integration branch history.

rejected.alternative: Squash all roadmap work into one integration commit
rejected.reason: That would obscure the issue/PR-level review boundaries the user asked to preserve.

acknowledged_constraints.note: Only the integration branch was updated; main was not merged or pushed.
Archive.zip remained untracked and was not staged, committed, or modified.

review_notes: Verification passed after integration: npm run check, npm run eval:acceptance, and git diff --check origin/agent/sherlog-memory-review-stack...HEAD.
The integration branch includes PR #75, #76, #77, #78, #79, #80, and #81 content.

architectural_claims: Sherlog now has a unified integration branch containing the evidence-level acceptance gate, query-profile ranking, deterministic evidence reads, operation-cost telemetry, and source adapter contract/fixture hardening slices.
behavioral_changes: Integration branch behavior combines the accepted behavior from the individual verified roadmap PRs; no additional production code was manually authored during this integration step.

api_changes.signature: find JSON evidence read fields from PR #76

security_implications: Source adapter contract and fixture work adds privacy/projection coverage; no secrets or external service behavior were changed by the integration step.
